patch.value: Add pm config set positional value form and shorten the invalid config-key error

Agent-UX polish (subset of pm-5k2w M5). (1) pm config set <key> <value> now accepts the value positionally and routes it to the correct typed flag (--policy/--format/--criterion) by key, with off/on/true/false -> disabled/enabled synonyms for boolean policy keys; the typed-flag forms still work and conflicting flag+positional is a clear error. (2) The invalid config-key error now lists only the ~21 canonical kebab keys plus '(underscore variants also accepted)' instead of all ~45 kebab+snake forms, cutting token cost for agents. Pure routing logic in src/core/config/positional-value.ts (100% covered); MCP+SDK contract parity added. Implemented by config-ux-subagent under pm-5k2w.

value.author: codex-gh-triage
value.text: GitHub/dependency/security triage addendum 2026-05-25: no GitHub issue/PR/dependency/security blocker found for the config UX work. Open repo issues=0, open PRs=0, current branch has no remote branch/PR yet, pnpm audit/outdated/security:scan are clean. Only relevant caution is shared branch CI: latest Nightly run 26390994985 fails on Windows Node 20 from existing test/runtime-loader issues unrelated to config UX; ensure config-focused tests plus the broader branch gate run before PR.

value.author: codex-impl-review
value.text: Implementation-review evidence: reviewed current uncommitted config positional-value, SDK/MCP contract, docs, and tests diff only. Focused tests passed (3 files, 55 tests) and manual temp PM_PATH smoke passed for config set telemetry-tracking off, config project set item-format toon, and config set definition-of-done. Finding/test gap: automated coverage exercises the pure router/runConfig path, but not the commander shorthand or MCP pm_run value path; add regression coverage for config set <key> <value> through the CLI entrypoint and MCP config action.

value.author: codex-dedupe-agent
value.text: Implementation note: addressed implementation-review sub-agent gap by adding real CLI parser coverage for config set <key> <value> and MCP pm_run config value coverage in addition to pure helper/runConfig unit coverage.

value.author: codex-dedupe-agent
value.text: Coordinator verification: config positional value work now has pure helper, runConfig, real CLI parser, and MCP pm_run coverage. Manual temp config smoke passed the intended positional flows plus shortened invalid-key error. Full release gate passed after test split.
